issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Consumer pact test with provider states
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses PactV3 from @pact-foundation/pact with MatchersV3 (like, string, integer), chains given().uponReceiving().withRequest().willRespondWith().executeTest(mockServer => ...), and writes pacts to a dir; baseline used jest mocks with no pact file generation.

scenarios.name: Can-i-deploy gate in CI before production deploy
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs npx pact-broker can-i-deploy --pacticipant --version $(git rev-parse HEAD) --to-environment production with --broker-base-url and --broker-token, plus record-deployment after deploy; baseline lacked the broker CLI gating step.
